title: Basic Living Tips for Foreign Residents in Korea
subtitle: Daily life in Korea is easier when you know where to check housing, healthcare, banking, and transport information.
bullets: Check your housing contract before signing.
Keep your health insurance and address updated.
Use official sources for banking and public service rules.
llama_rule: Each bullet must be practical and related to daily settlement life.
Allowed topics include housing, banking, healthcare, insurance, transportation, telecom, local support, and public services.
Do not include travel-only or tourism-only information.
Do not include system or operation messages.
